meta.title: Simone Nigro — Full-Stack Developer · Angular & Node.js
meta.description: Simone Nigro, full-stack developer from Avellino, Italy. Author of Angular and Node.js open source libraries with 75,000+ monthly npm downloads: ng-let, ng-http-caching, ng-simple-state and more.
meta.ogDescription: Angular and Node.js open source libraries with 75,000+ monthly npm downloads. Full-stack developer @ ACCA software.

hero.claim: I build open source libraries “nobody asked for but that, apparently, some people use”.
hero.meta: Avellino, Italy — full-stack developer @ ACCA software S.p.A.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I have been building for the web since 2000: first as a freelance graphic and web designer under the SN.DESIGN brand, today as a full-stack developer at ACCA software S.p.A. I hold a degree in Communication Sciences from the University of Salerno.
about.bio2: Open source is my passion: I maintain about ten Angular and Node.js libraries published on npm — 75,000+ downloads per month — I have been a WordPress core contributor (5.5) and the author of the «Speed Up» plugin series. I write about Angular, Node.js and performance on DEV Community.
about.bio3: My style has always been the same: clean, almost minimalist, without neglecting the user experience. With one extra obsession: performance.

projects.title: Open source
projects.sub: {{count}} Angular and Node.js libraries published on npm, {{downloads}} downloads per month.

desc.ng-http-caching: Cache for HTTP requests in Angular applications.
desc.ng-let: Structural directive to declare local variables in HTML templates.
desc.ng-simple-state: Simple state management for Angular, with just Services and Signal. Supports WebMCP.
desc.ng-for-track-by-property: Global trackBy for template loops, with strict type checking.
desc.ng-generic-pipe: Generic pipe to use component methods inside the template.
desc.codice-fiscale: PHP library for validating Italian fiscal codes, with omocodia support.
desc.ng-as: Pipe and directive for type casting template variables.
desc.ng-lock: Angular decorator to lock functions and UI while an async task is running.
desc.turbo-array: High-performance lazy pipelines for JavaScript arrays, up to 4× faster.
desc.express-fast-json-stringify: fast-json-stringify for Express: faster JSON serialization with JSON Schema.
